goals: Explore what memories are currently stored in the system
Store a memory about attending Derek Ryan concerts
Search for memories related to concert experiences
Review all stored memories to verify the new entry was added

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic country music fan who is exploring a new feature. Asks questions openly and likes to test things hands-on.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know the technical details of how the memory system works or what tool names are available. Just knows they want to save and retrieve information about their concert experiences.

end_condition: The user has successfully added a memory about their Derek Ryan concert experiences and verified it was stored correctly by reviewing all memories.
